course_notes: Tight Pete Dye layout. Premium on accuracy off the tee and wedge play into small Bermuda greens. Veteran specialists dominate.
winner_archetype: Course specialists who drive it straight and score with the wedges. Recent winners include Fitzpatrick (2026), Spieth (2022), Matsuyama (2021).
bbi_pipeline_action: Display anchor for player profile build. Will be overwritten Monday 2026-04-27 by MNEMOSYNE roll-forward to Miami Championship (Trump Doral, 2026-04-30).
